failures.description: The agent invented an unsupported count and record identifier instead of answering from the ProductCatalogSearch result, which showed exactly 2 matching items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available bagged Vacuum Cleaners costing more than $591.59. The tool call was appropriate and returned 2 matching items with item_ids 1345513440 and 2872451762. At step 4, the Executor produced an answer claiming there are 9 options and citing record 0000000000, neither of which appears in the tool output or prior context. This fabricated information was used as the final answer and was not corrected later.
